sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21367" key="ga/ggalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γάγγᾰλ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21367.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fickle person</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
